---
pagetitle: "Connectionism"
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: blog-listing
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  template: _ejs/blogroll.ejs
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
  fields: [title, date, description, path]
---

::: {.tm-shell}
# Research lab {.blog-page-title}

::: {.tm-intro}
A collection of notes, experiments, and writing on machine learning.
:::

::: {#blog-listing}
:::
:::
